name: 13-factor-product-readiness
title: 13-factor-product-readiness
summary: Audit and refactor repositories for product positioning, onboarding, examples, validation, release readiness, GitHub polish, Agent-native usage, and launch quality.
recommended_trigger_phrases: Use the 13-factor-product-readiness skill to audit this repository for launch readiness, onboarding, product polish, release discipline, and open-source credibility.
Use the 13-factor-product-readiness skill to turn this demo repository into a publishable product-quality open-source project.
review_protocol: Identify target user, product promise, and primary use case.
Review first 30 seconds and first 5 minutes of onboarding.
Apply the 13-factor checklist and score the repository.
Recommend paired technical Factor Skills for follow-up.
